name: Cursed!
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting cursed by the Claw of 'The Noxious Spawn'. The wrath of the Noxious Spawn - you accidentally managed to incur it. Your days are counted and your death inevitable. Sometime. Someplace.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Daraman's Footsteps
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Northern Darama (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You journeyed through Darashia and the sea of sand around it, while fighting the perils of the desert.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Daring Trespasser
spoilerText: Obtainable by entering Devovorga's lair on Vengoth, during the Rise of Devovorga Quest. You've entered the lair of Devovorga and joined the crew trying to take her down - whether crowned with success or not doesn't matter, but they can't blame you for not trying!

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Dark Voodoo Priest
spoilerText: Obtainable by using dworc Voodoo Doll on someone till bloodhit. Sinister curses, evil magic - you don't shy away from punishing others by questionable means. Someone just gave you a strange look - now where's that needle again?
inferenceReason: Recommended level 35 from related reward: Voodoo Doll Quest.

name: Dazzler
spoilerText: Obtainable through repeating Antenna Blinding task 50 times. In the war against the hive, your efforts in blinding it begin to pay off. Your actions have blinded the hive severely and the entity seems to become aware that something dangerous is happening.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Death from Below
spoilerText: Obtained after opening the treasure chest of Abyssador for the first time after slaying it. The face of the enemy is unmasked. You have encountered one of 'those below' and survived. More than that, you managed to kill the beast and prove once and for all that the enemy can be beaten.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Death in the Depths
spoilerText: Obtained by destroying all 3 lava pumps after defeating the bosses of Warzone 4, Warzone 5 and Warzone 6. The Baron from Below, Duke of the Depths and the Count of the Core are no more!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from quest reward: Dangerous Depths Quest.

name: Death on Strike
spoilerText: Obtainable by opening Deathstrike's chest 50 times. Again and again Deathstrike has fallen to your prowess. Perhaps it's time for people calling YOU Deathstrike from now on.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Death Song
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing 300 Deepling Spellsingers. You hushed the songs of war in the black depths by sliencing more than three hundred Deepling Spellsingers.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from quest reward: Liquid Black Quest.

name: Deep Sea Diver
spoilerText: Obtainable by walking 1,000,000 steps underwater. Confirmed working tiles are Ocean Floor, underwater ‎Marble Floor and underwater Sandstone Floor. Lava crack tiles in the Sea Serpent Area are not counted, as those are also used on land. Tip: use a Coconut Shrimp Bake to increase your underwater walking speed before attempting this achievement. Under the sea - might not be your natural living space, but you're feeling quite comfortable on the ocean floor. Quara don't scare you anymore and sometimes you sleep with your helmet of the deep still equipped.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 110 from related reward: The Explorer Society Quest.

name: Deer Hunt
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing 400 White Deer (enraged or desperate). You managed to kill more than four hundred white deer - it looks like you are one of the main reasons they will soon be considered extinct, way to go!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Demonbane
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Demon Hunter Outfits. You don't carry that stake just for decoration - you're prepared to use it. Usually you're seen hightailing through the deepest dungeons leaving a trail of slain demons. Whoever dares stand in your way should prepare to die.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 150 from quest reward: The Inquisition Quest.

name: Demonic Barkeeper
spoilerText: Obtainable by shaking 250 Flask of Demonic Blood. Thick, red - shaken, not stirred - and with a straw in it: that's the way you prefer your demon blood. Served with an onion ring, the subtle metallic aftertaste is almost not noticeable. Beneficial effects on health or mana are welcome.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Depth Dwellers
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing 300 Deepling Warriors. By eliminating at least three hundred Deepling Warriors you delivered quite a blow to the amassing armies of the deep.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from quest reward: Liquid Black Quest.

name: Desert Fisher
spoilerText: Obtainable for fishing a Sandfish during River Runs Deep Mini World Change. You managed to catch a fish in a surrounding that usually doesn't even carry water. Everything is subject to change, probably...
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Devovorga's Nemesis
spoilerText: Obtainable by significantly contributing to the battle with Devovorga during the Rise of Devovorga World Quest. One special hero among many. This year - it was you. Devovorga withdrew in a darker realm because she could not withstand your power - and that of your comrades. Time will tell if the choice you made was good - but for now, it saved your world.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Diplomatic Immunity
spoilerText: Obtainable by opening Abyssador's chest 50 times. You killed the ambassador of the abyss that often that they might consider sending another one. Perhaps that will one day stop further intrusions.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Do a Barrel Roll!
spoilerText: Obtainable by receiving a Blue Rolling Barrel, Green Rolling Barrel or a Red Rolling Barrel. Note: You can obtain the 3 different Barrels, but there is only one achievement given for the first one you chose. Riding a traditional beer barrel from the Orcsoberfest is a once-in-a-lifetime experience. Beer sold separately.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Do Not Disturb
spoilerText: Obtainable by closing house windows 100 times. Urgh! Close the windows! Shut out the sun rearing its ugly yellow head, shut out the earsplitting laughter of your neighbour's corpulent children. Ahhh. Embrace sweet darkness and silence.
inferenceReason: Estimated as a low-level standalone task from the spoiler text.

name: Doctor! Doctor!
spoilerText: Obtainable by delivering 100 Medicine Pouches to Ottokar in Venore Poor House. Did someone call a doctor? You delivered 100 medicine bags to Ottokar of the Venore poor house in times of dire need, well done!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Dog Sitter
spoilerText: Obtainable by finding the King's dog Noodles during the Noodles is Gone Mini World Change. You showed Noodles the way home. How long will it take this time until he's on the loose again? That dog must be really bored in the throne room by now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Down the Drain
spoilerText: Obtainable for killing 50 water elementals in Outlaw Camp/Water Elemental Dungeon during Down the Drain Mini World Change. You've found a secret dungeon in the flooded plains and killed several of its inhabitants. And now you have wet feet.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Dragon Mimicry
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Dragonling. It's not really a dragon, but rather a kind of chimera. Nonetheless a decent mount to impress any passer-by.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from related reward: Realm of Dreams Quest.

name: Drama in Darama
spoilerText: Obtained by finishing the An Ancient Feud mission of the Grimvale Quest. If a pride of lions and a pack of hyaenas feud, it is not called a catfight but a ... whatsoever. For sure, it caused a lot of drama in the Darama Desert.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Grimvale Quest.

name: Dread Lord
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the rank of Dread Lord of the Brotherhood of Bones faction in the Dreamer's Challenge Quest. You don't care for rules that others set up and shape the world to your liking. Having left behind meaningless conventions and morals, you prize only the power you wield. You're a master of your fate and battle to cleanse the world.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from quest reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest.

name: Dream Catcher
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing The Nightmare Beast and then reporting to Undal or Vanys. You are the slayer of the ancient nightmare beast and prevented the nightmare to spread its madness.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: The Dream Courts Quest.

name: Dream Warden
spoilerText: Obtained by getting the Dream Warden Outfits with both addons. It doesn't matter what noise you would hear... dream, nightmare, illusion - there is nothing you can't vanquish. You are a true Dream Warden.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: Dream Warden Outfits Quest.

name: Dream Warrior
spoilerText: Obtainable by receiving both addons of the Dream Warrior Outfits. You became an acquaintance of the courts of dreams and acquired the right to display your new status and title of 'dream warrior'.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: The Dream Courts Quest, Dream Warrior Outfits Quest.

name: Dream Wright
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the Mend What's Broken task of the Roshamuul Quest 34 times (freeing 102 Shimmying Butterflies). You have mended many a broken dream and so, the dream of Roshamuul is safely being told over and over again.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Roshamuul Quest, Roshamuul Quest.

name: Dream's Over
related: Killing in the Name of... Quest
relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by slaying Tormentor. No more fear and bad dreams. You stabbed Tormentor to death with its scythe leg.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Duked It Out
spoilerText: Obtainable by using the lava pump in the room reached after defeating The Duke Of The Depths in the Dangerous Depths Quest. You defeated the Duke of the Depths and destroyed his lava pump!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from quest reward: Dangerous Depths Quest.

name: Dungeon Cleaner
spoilerText: Obtainable by clearing the first 3 Warzones. Seen it all. Done it all. Your unstoppable force swept through the dungeons and you vanquished their masters. Not to forget the precious loot you took! Now stop reading this and continue hunting! Time is money after all!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Dwarven Mines
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Kazordoon (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Vast mines, an orc fortress and the magnificence of Kazordoon - you really know every corner of North-Eastern Mainland now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Echo Hunter
spoilerText: The echoes are beginning to infiltrate your dreams.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Echo Initiate
spoilerText: Obtained after triggering an Echo Raid for the first time You are quite curious about these echoes.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Echo Walker
spoilerText: Walking past an echo is no option. You're already addicted.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Efreet Ally
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Djinn War - Efreet Faction. Even though the Efreet welcomed you only reluctantly and viewed you as "only a human" for quite some time, you managed to impress Malor and gained his respect and trade options with the green djinns.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from related reward: The Djinn War - Marid Faction, The Djinn War - Marid Faction.

name: Elementary, My Dear
spoilerText: Obtainable by drinking a Pint of Glooth and accessing Dr Merlay's hideout during Dr Merlay's Misery Task in the Oramond Quest. Through the spirit of science and exploration, you have discovered how to enter the secret hideout of the renowned Dr Merlay.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Oramond Quest, Oramond Quest.

name: Elite Hunter
relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the rank of Elite Hunter in the Killing in the Name of... Quest, Paw and Fur Ranks. You jump at every opportunity for a hunting challenge that's offered to you and carry out those tasks with deadly precision. You're a hunter at heart and a valuable member of the Paw & Fur Society.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Elven Woods
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Ab'Dendriel (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Tall trees, deep forests and and the beauty of Ab'Dendriel - you really know every corner of the elven lands now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Ender of the End
spoilerText: Complete the Heart of Destruction Quest. You have entered the heart of destruction and valiantly defeated the world devourer. By your actions you have postponed the end of the world — at least for a while.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: Heart of Destruction Quest.

name: Ending the Horror
spoilerText: Obtained by finishing the mission A Retched Beginning during the Roshamuul Quest. You have cleansed the lands of many retching horrors. You sure know how to end a bad dream: forcefully, that's how!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Roshamuul Quest.

name: Engine Driver
spoilerText: Obtained by getting the Gloothomotive mount. This glooth-driven locomotive will bring you to any party in the blink of an eye.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from linked quest: 25 Years of Tibia Quest.

name: Enlightened, Indeed
spoilerText: You stared into the Light without blinking. Foolish or enlightened... who can tell?
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Enter zze Draken!
related: Killing in the Name of... Quest
relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by slaying Paiz the Pauperizer. You gave zzze draken a tazte of your finizzzing move.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Errand Runner
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing 100 Weekly Tasks (either delivery or creature killing tasks) on the Task Board. Your stash is cleared, your bestiary completed but the grind has only just begun.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Exalted Battle Mage
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Battle Mage Outfits. Not only did you master the battlefield as a mage, you were also induced to the most inner secrets of the art of magical warfare and prevailed.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 300 from quest reward: Battle Mage Outfits Quest.

name: Exemplary Citizen
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Citizen Outfits. Every city should be proud to call someone like you its inhabitant. You're keeping the streets clean and help settling the usual disputes in front of the depot. Also, you probably own a cat and like hiking.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 10 from quest reward: Citizen Outfits Quest.

name: Explorer
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the second explorer's mission, The Spectral Dress, in The Explorer Society Quest. You've been to places most people don't even know the names of. Collecting botanic, zoologic and ectoplasmic samples is your daily business and you're always prepared to discover new horizons.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 8 from quest reward: Explorer Brooch Quest, Spike Tasks Quest, Lion's Rock Quest.

name: Exquisite Taste
spoilerText: Obtainable by catching 250 fish through Ice Fishing. You love fish - but preferably those caught in the cold north. Even though they're hard to come by you never get tired of picking holes in ice sheets and hanging your fishing rod in.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from related reward: The Isle of Evil Quest.

name: Exterminator
spoilerText: Obtainable through repeating Kollos Killing task 100 times Efficient and lethal, you have gained significant experience in fighting the elite forces of the hive. Almost single-handed, you have slain the best of the Hive Born and live to tell the tale.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Extreme Degustation
spoilerText: Obtainable by making the Daily Task of Children of the Revolution Quest Collect. Almost all the plants you tested for Chartan in Zao where inedible - you tasted them all, yet you're still standing! You should really get some fresh air now, though.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Eye of the Deep
spoilerText: Obtainable by helping to kill Groam. You didn't look into it - at least not for too long... but Groam did. And you relieved him. Just don't tell his friend Dronk.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fabled Construction
spoilerText: Obtained by building a Glooth Glider. Finding all the pieces to this complicated vehicle was one kind of a challenge. However, what you built in the end is rather a fabled than a feeble construction.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Hero of Rathleton Quest.

name: Fairy Teasing
spoilerText: Use a total of 100 usable Small Plant Houses (This is my house! Back off!) and Dancing Fairies (Doooon't touch me! *puff*). Teasing fairies is fun. They leave behind such pretty clouds of glittering dust when chased. Just hope they don't get you back for it.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from related reward: Threatened Dreams Quest.

name: Falconer
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the full Falconer Outfits. A true beastmaster learns the language of his animal companions. Now you as well can bolster your unique bond with nature and help preserve the balance of life as a proud falconer.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fall of the Fallen
spoilerText: Obtainable by opening Gnomevil's reward chest 50 times. Have you ever wondered how he reappears again and again? You only care for the loot, do you? Gotcha!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Fata Morgana
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Dromedary. There are many delusions and phantasms in the desert. You saw a false oasis with fruit-bearing palm trees. Instead of water and refreshment, however, you found a dromedary in the end. What a useful Fata Morgana!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fearless
spoilerText: Obtainable by breaking 50 Ornate Canopic Jars during The Mummy's Curse World Change event. You broke the jar of Horestis - fifty times. Either you know no fear or simply ignore it. Whatever the case, you are "fearless" indeed.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Feral Trapper
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the Feral Trapper Outfits. You've learned the way of the wilderness: its patience, its fury, its grace. As a feral trapper, you embody them all.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fiend Rider
spoilerText: Obtained by using a Demon in a Green Box and taming a Primal Demonosaur. Riding such an ancient beast is certainly a good and harmless idea.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fiend Slayer
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Fiend Slayer Outfits. No living fiends were hurt to achieve this outfit.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 500 from quest reward: Fiend Slayer Outfits Quest, No Rest for the Wicked Quest.

name: Final Strike
spoilerText: Obtained after opening the treasure chest of Deathstrike for the first time after slaying it. The mighty Deathstrike is dead! One legend is dead and you're on your way to become one yourself.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Fire Devil
spoilerText: Obtainable by using 100 Dry Pieces of Wood on the slide of the Bewitched event. Note: you don't have to add your Dry Pieces of Wood during the event itself to gain the achievement. To keep the witches' fire burning, you trashed a lot of the wood the bane bringers animated. Some might find your fascination for fire ... disturbing.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fire from the Earth
spoilerText: Obtainable for killing 50 fiery creatures in and on the Hellgore volcano during the Fire from the Earth Mini World Change. You've survived the Hellgorge eruption and found a way through the flames and lava. You've even managed to kill a few fireborn on the way.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 65 from related reward: The Shattered Isles Quest.

name: Fire Lighter
spoilerText: Obtainable by using one Dry Piece of Wood on the slide during the Bewitched event. You have helped to keep the witches fire burning. Just watch your fingers, it's hot!

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Firefighter
spoilerText: Obtained by extinguishing 500 fires during the Thornfire world change. You extinguished 500 thornfires! You were there when the Firestarters took over Shadowthorn. You saved the day - and the home of some elves which will try to kill you nonetheless. Isn't it nice to see everything restored just as it was before..?
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Firewalker
spoilerText: This achievement can be gotten by walking 1,000,000 tiles on fire while wearing Firewalker Boots. Note that any type of fire field will work for this achievement (even player-made ones) as long as the fields inflict damage for the boots to block. Running barefoot across ember is not for you! You do it the elegant way. Yet, you're kind of drawn to fire and warm surroundings in general - you like it hot!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from quest reward: The Hidden City of Beregar Quest.

name: Fireworks in the Sky
spoilerText: Obtainable by using 250 Fireworks Rockets on the floor (doesn't count if used in your backpack/container). You love the moment right before your rocket takes off and explodes into beautiful colours - not only on new year's eve!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: First Achievement
spoilerText: Obtained by painting a picture of the Colossus Fortress during the 25 Years of Tibia Quest. Congratulations to your very first achievement! ... Well, not really. But imagine, it is. Because at this point during your journey into Tibia's past, achievements have been introduced.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from linked quest: 25 Years of Tibia Quest, 25 Years of Tibia Quest.

name: Follower of Azerus
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing mission 9 In Service of Yalahar Quest when you follow all of Yalahari (NPC)'s instructions. Note: If you finish one or some missions by following Palimuth's instructions you will get the Turncoat achievement instead. When you do something, you do it right. You have an opinion and you stand by it - and no one will be able to convince you otherwise. On a sidenote, you're a bit on the brutal and war-oriented side, but that's not a bad thing, is it?
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: In Service of Yalahar Quest.

name: Follower of Palimuth
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing mission 9 of In Service of Yalahar Quest when you follow all of Palimuth's instructions. Note: If you finish one or some missions by following Yalahari (NPC)'s instructions you will get the Turncoat achievement instead. You're a peacekeeper and listen to what the small people have to say. You've made up your mind and know who to help and for which reasons - and you do it consistently. Your war is fought with reason rather than weapons.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: In Service of Yalahar Quest.

name: Fool at Heart
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Jester Outfits. And remember: Never try to teach a pig to sing. It wastes your time and annoys the pig.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from quest reward: What a Foolish Quest.

name: Forbidden Fruit
spoilerText: Obtained by eating a Forbidden Fruit. You could not resist the taste of the forbidden fruit. Since you don't feel changed at all, it couldn't have been that bad after all. Or could it?
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Forgotten Knowledge Quest.

name: Forbidden Knowledge
spoilerText: Obtained by using a Key to Knowledge on the Forbidden Tome, both of which will be consumed; this won't work if you have never eaten a Forbidden Fruit. Perhaps with so much acquired knowledge, never meant for you, you know even when to stop! Time will tell whether this knowledge will do more harm or good.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Forgotten Knowledge Quest.

name: Fountain of Life
spoilerText: Obtainable by drinking from the fountain of life in pits of inferno's entrance here. You found and took a sip from the Fountain of Life. Thought it didn't grant you eternal life, you feel changed and somehow at peace.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Free Items!
spoilerText: Obtainable after getting 50 items from Crates. Yay! Finders keepers, losers weepers! Who cares where all that stuff came from and if you had to crawl through garbage piles to get it? It's FREE!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Fried Shrimp
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Crustacea Gigantica. This must be underwater love - this enormous crustacean now does thy bidding. Or maybe it's just in it for a little more of that shrimp barbecue, as that's a little hard to come by in the sea.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Friend of Elves
spoilerText: Obtained by taming an Enraged White Deer. Kingly deer mostly prefer elves as friends and familiars. This one, however, decided to favour you as a confidant and rider. Well done!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from related reward: Realm of Dreams Quest.

name: Friend of the Apes
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Ape City Quest. You know Banuta like the back of your hand and are good at destroying caskets and urns. The sight of giant footprints doesn't keep you from exploring unknown areas either.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from linked quest: The Ape City Quest.

name: Friendly Fire
spoilerText: Obtained by getting the complete Fire-Fighter Outfits. You mastered the fire and tamed a supervulcano!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: Fire-Fighter Outfits Quest.

name: Fully Decayed
spoilerText: Obtained by getting both addons of the Decaying Defender Outfits. You defeated the embodiments of decay and live to tell the tale, wear the rotting attire of the unfaltering defender proudly.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 700 from quest reward: Decaying Defender Outfits Quest.

name: Funghitastic
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the Soil Guardian Outfits. Finally your dream to become a walking mushroom has come true ... No, wait a minute!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from quest reward: Soil Guardian Outfits Quest.

name: Gatherer
spoilerText: Obtainable through repeating Dissolved Chitin task 10 times. By killing creatures of the hive and gaining weapons for further missions, you started a quite effective way of war. You gathered a lot of dissolved chitin to resupply the war effort.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Gear Up
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Walker. Installing that control unit was a no-brainer. Now you're in control to make it walk this way or that, or to change tack at any moment if required. Your faithful walker mount obeys your every command.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from related reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest, Nightmare Outfits Quest.

name: Gem Cutter
spoilerText: Obtainable during Liquid Black Quest for cutting your first Heart of the Sea. You cut your first gem - and it bears your own name! Now that would be a nice gift! This does not make it a "true" Heart of the Sea, however...
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from quest reward: Liquid Black Quest.

name: Ghost Sailor
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing 1 journey in A Pirate's Death to Me. You have sailed the nether seas with the Ghost Captain. Despite the perils, you and your fellow crewmen have braved the challenge.

availability.label: Active when A Pirate's Death to Me is active: Friday on the 18th-23rd, usually through Monday.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Ghostwhisperer
spoilerText: Obtainable by: Talking to Ghost of a Priest in the 4th mission of the Wrath of the Emperor Quest; Talking to A Wandering Soul in the 5th mission of the Blood Brothers Quest; and Talking to A Restless Soul in the Formorgar Mines 1 mission of the Ice Islands Quest. You don't hunt them, you talk to them. You know that ghosts might keep secrets that have been long lost among the living, and you're skilled at talking them into revealing them to you.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from linked quest: Wrath of the Emperor Quest, Blood Brothers Quest.

name: Glooth Engineer
spoilerText: Obtained by getting the Glooth Engineer Outfits with both addons. Though you might have averted a dire threat for Rathleton, this relative peace may only hold for a while. At least you've scavenged an outfit from some of the poor fellows that have fallen prey to death priest Shagron.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 150 from quest reward: Dark Trails Quest, Glooth Engineer Outfits Quest.

name: Glooth Punk
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Oramond (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Glooth is the substance that powers a whole continent and all its weird inhabitants, workshops and factories. You travelled this strange smorgasbord of curiosities in its entirety - just in time for tea.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Gnome Friend
spoilerText: Obtainable by advancing to rank II in the Bigfoot's Burden Quest. The gnomes are warming up to you. One or two of them might actually bother to remember your name. You're allowed to access their gnomebase alpha. You are prepared to boldly put your big feet into areas few humans have walked before.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest, Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Gnome Little Helper
spoilerText: Obtainable by advancing to rank I in the Bigfoot's Burden Quest. You think the gnomes start to like you. A little step for a Bigfoot but a big step for humanity.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest, Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: Gnomebane's Bane

spoilerText: Obtained by finishing the The Order of the Lion Quest. You bested the maleficent duo Drume and Fugue and restored order to the besieged town of Bounac. You conquered the exotic stronghold of the Order of the Cobra and bested the undead knights of the Order of the Falcon. A true knight in heart and mind.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: The Order of the Lion Quest.

name: Little Adventure
spoilerText: Obtainable by unlocking 10 easy monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 10 easy monsters in the cyclopedia.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Little Ball of Wool
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Black Sheep. You found a lost sheep and thus a steady source of black wool. But careful: don't get entangled.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Little Big Adventure
spoilerText: Obtainable by unlocking 100 easy monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 100 easy monsters in the cyclopedia.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Lizard Kingdom
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Zao as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. From the southern steppe through the Dragonblaze Mountains and the Muggy Plains to the forbidden city of Razachai - you really know every corner of Zao now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Long Live the Queen
spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Carlin (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Ancient battlefields, amazons and the glory of Carlin - you really know every corner of Queen Eloise's realm now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Lord of the Elements
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Elemental Spheres Quest. You travelled the surreal realm of the elemental spheres, summoned and slayed the Lord of the Elements, all in order to retrieve neutral matter. And as brave as you were, you couldn't have done it without your team!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Elemental Spheres Quest.

name: Lord Protector
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the rank of Lord Protector of the Nightmare Knights faction in the Dreamer's Challenge Quest. You proved yourself - not only in your dreams - and possess a strong and spiritual mind. Your valorous fight against demons and the undead plague has granted you the highest and most respected rank among the Nightmare Knights.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from quest reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest.

name: Lost Letters
spoilerText: Obtainable by reading all personal letters from the Isle of Ada mini bosses. Many letters have been written by knights of the Order of the Stag. Some personal while others were simply a mistake. We often ask ourselves what happened to these once corresponding souls, we hope for the best but have to fear for the worst.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Lost Palace Raider
spoilerText: Complete The Lost Brother Quest and the Asura Palace Quest. Lifting the secrets of a fabulous palace and defeating a beautiful demon princess was a thrilling experience indeed. This site's marvels nearly matched its terrors. Nearly.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from quest reward: Asura Palace Quest, The Lost Brother Quest.

name: Lovely Dots
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Ladybug. Finding a four-leaved clover is always a sign of luck. And as luck would have it, you even baited a lovely dotted ladybug. Lucky you!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Loyal Lad
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Donkey. Having a loyal friend alongside is comforting to every adventurer. If only this lad was not so stubborn...
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Loyal Subject
spoilerText: Say "Hello King" to King Tibianus during the Kingsday Mini World Change. You joined the Kingsday festivities and payed King Tibianus your respects. Now, off to party!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from related reward: The Isle of Evil Quest.

name: Lucid Dreamer
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing the Mission 4 of Dreamer's Challenge Quest. Dreams - are your reality? Strange visions, ticking clocks, going to bed and waking up somewhere completely else - that was some trip, but you're almost sure you actually did enjoy it.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from quest reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest.

name: Lucky Devil
spoilerText: To get this achievement you need to fish a Leviathan's Amulet from the corpse of a Water Elemental or Massive Water Elemental AND unrust a Golden Armor out of a Slightly Rusted Armor. See also: Water Elemental/Fishing Statistics, Massive Water Elemental/Fishing Statistics, and Slightly Rusted Armor/Unrusting Statistics That's almost too much luck for one person. If something's really, really rare - it probably falls into your lap sooner or later. Congratulations!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from related reward: The Isle of Evil Quest.

name: Lucky Horseshoe
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Wild Horse. 'Sweets for my steed' could be your motto. An impressive horse is eating out of your hand. Saddle up and be ready to find adventure, new friends, and maybe someone to shoe your horse now and then.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from related reward: Realm of Dreams Quest.

name: Luminous Kitty
spoilerText: Obtained by getting a very special present from Santa Claus. You made some efforts to bring a little more light into the world. And what a nice present you got in return!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Luring Silence
spoilerText: Obtained by finishing the mission Luring Silencers during the Roshamuul Quest. What a scientific discovery - they really DO communicate! Using their own communication habits against them, you lured a large pack of silencers away from the walls of Roshamuul.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Roshamuul Quest.

name: Mageslayer
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing the Energized Raging Mage twice. You killed the raging mage in his tower south of Zao. Again. But this one just keeps coming back. The dimensional portal collapsed once more and you know he will eventually return but hey - a raging mage, it's like asking for it...
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Magnetised
spoilerText: Obtained by taming an Ironblight. This magnetic beast attracted you in a very literal way. Or was it attracted by your metal equipment? Anyway, you seem to be stuck together now.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 60 from related reward: Realm of Dreams Quest.

name: Mainstreet Nightmare
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the full Poltergeist Outfits. Now you are able to wander around Tibia wearing an angst-inducing vestment.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 300 from quest reward: Poltergeist Outfits Quest.

name: Make a Wish
spoilerText: Obtainable by blowing out the candle of 5 Party Cakes. But close your eyes and don't tell anyone what you wished for, or it won't come true!
inferenceReason: Estimated as a low-level standalone task from the spoiler text.

name: Malefitz
related: The Order of the Lion Quest
relatedQuestNames: The Order of the Lion Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by delivering Fitzwilliam's Special Reserve to Fitzmaurice. Made acquaintance with three brothers Fitz.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from linked quest: The Order of the Lion Quest.

name: Manic
spoilerText: Obtainable by repeating Destroy The Hive Crystals 100 times. You have destroyed a significant amount of the hive's vital nerve centers and caused massive destruction to the hive's awareness. You are probably causing the hive horrible nightmares.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Marble Madness
spoilerText: Obtainable by making five Beautiful Marble Statues from a Piece of Marble Rock. Your little statues of Tibiasula have become quite famous around Tibia and there's few people with similar skills when it comes to shaping marble.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 10 from related reward: Jack to the Future Quest.

name: Marblelous
spoilerText: Obtainable by making a Beautiful Marble Statue from a Piece of Marble Rock. You're an aspiring marble sculptor with promising skills - proven by the perfect little Tibiasula statue you shaped. One day you'll be really famous!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 10 from related reward: Jack to the Future Quest.

name: Marid Ally
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Djinn War - Marid Faction. You've proven to be a valuable ally to the Marid, and Gabel welcomed you to trade with Haroun and Nah'Bob whenever you want to. Though the Djinn war has still not ended, the Marid can't fail with you on their side.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from related reward: The Djinn War - Efreet Faction.

name: Masquerader
spoilerText: Obtainable by using 100 Costume Bags of Stan. You probably don't know anymore how you really look like - usually when you look into a mirror, some kind of monster stares back at you. On the other hand - maybe that's an improvement?
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Master Debater
spoilerText: Obtained by getting all books of The Grand Master of Verbal Debate and by defeating Grand Master Oberon during The Secret Library Quest. You truly are the grand master of verbal debate! Now going forth and putting this wisdom to good use in everyday life... is probably debatable.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 500 from linked quest: The Secret Library Quest, The Secret Library Quest.

name: Master Hunter
spoilerText: Obtainable by unlocking 100 hard monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 100 hard monsters in the cyclopedia.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Master of the Nexus
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Inquisition Quest. You were able to fight your way through the countless hordes in the Demon Forge. Once more you proved that nothing is impossible.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 150 from quest reward: The Inquisition Quest.

name: Master of War
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Warmaster Outfits. You're not afraid to show your colours in the heat of battle. Enemies fear your lethal lance and impenetrable armor. The list of the wars you've won is impressive. Hail and kill!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from quest reward: Warmaster Outfits Quest.

name: Master Shapeshifter
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting trough teleport changed into every possible (8) forms during Last Creep Standing Event not necessarily during one try. You have mastered Kuriks challenge in all possible shapes.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: Recommended level 20 from quest reward: Last Creep Standing.

name: Master Thief
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing The Thieves Guild Quest. Robbing, inviting yourself to VIP parties, faking contracts and pretending to be someone else - you're a jack of all trades when it comes to illegal activities. You take no prisoners, except for the occasional goldfish now and then.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 70 from quest reward: The Thieves Guild Quest.

name: Mastermind
spoilerText: Obtainable by drinking 100 Mastermind Potions. You feel you could solve the hardest riddles within a minute or so. Plus, there's a nice boost on your spell damage. All in a little bottle. Aftereffects - feeling slightly stupid. For further questions consult your healer or potion dealer.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 90 from quest reward: Mastermind Potion Quest, The New Frontier Quest.

name: Matchmaker
relatedQuestNames: The Scatterbrained Sorcerer Quest - Mission 3: Love's a Wicked Game
The Shattered Isles Quest - Breaking the Spell
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing The Scatterbrained Sorcerer Quest - Mission 3: Love's a Wicked Game, or by completing The Shattered Isles Quest - Breaking the Spell (Access to Laguna Islands). You don't believe in romance to be a coincidence or in love at first sight. In fact - love potions, bouquets of flowers and cheesy poems do the trick much better than ever could. Keep those hormones flowing!
inferenceReason: Recommended level 65 from quest reward: The Shattered Isles Quest.

name: Mathemagician
spoilerText: Obtainable by talking with "A Prisoner" in Paradox Tower Quest. Sometimes the biggest secrets of life can have a simple solution.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 50 from quest reward: The Paradox Tower Quest.

name: Measuring the World
spoilerText: Obtained by getting the second addon of the Discoverer Outfits. Step by step you discovered many of the secrets hidden in the world, thus gaining the right to wear the Discoverer outfit and hat. Made-to-measure for a brave traveller of the Tibian wilds.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Meat Skewer
related: Killing in the Name of... Quest
relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by slaying Bloodtusk. You've impaled the big mammoth Bloodtusk with his own tusks.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Merry Adventures
related: Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest
relatedQuestNames: Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest
Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest. You went into the forest, met Rottin Wood and the Married Men and helped them out in their camp. Oh, and don't worry about those merchants. They won't dare mentioning the strangely large sums of gold they actually possessed which are missing now.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 20 from quest reward: Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest.

name: Millennial Falcon
spoilerText: Obtained by defeating Grand Master Oberon during The Secret Library Quest. You defeated Grand Master Oberon and the remnants of the Order of the Falcon, no matter the odds.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 500 from linked quest: The Secret Library Quest, The Secret Library Quest.

name: Mimic
spoilerText: Apparently not all chests are the same. Some have a life of their own and if you think about it... how do so many of them actually refill every day? Well, you're one step closer to revealing this secret
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Mind the Dog!
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Modified Gnarlhound. Barking dogs never bite, as the saying goes. But this one clearly tried. In the end, however, you were able to walk the dog - ahem, gnarlhound.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from linked quest: Shadows of Yalahar Quest.

name: Mind the Step!
related: Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest
relatedQuestNames: Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest
Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest
spoilerText: Received when obtaining The Orb of Darkness Eternal in Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest. You've got a mind ready to draw strange conclusions that defy the laws of logic and sidestep reality. Or maybe it's just a lucky guess - or adventurous recklessness?
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest.

name: Minor Disturbance
spoilerText: Obtainable through repeating Antenna Blinding task 10 times. Your actions start to make a difference. You have blinded the antennae of the hive often enough to become an annoyance to it.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Minstrel
spoilerText: Obtainable by playing Musical Instruments 500 times and by solving the instruments puzzle in Vashresamun's antechamber. You can handle any music instrument you're given - and actually manage to produce a pleasant sound with it. You're a welcome guest and entertainer in most taverns.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Mister Sandman
spoilerText: Obtainable by using a bed or a cot 500 times (logging out). Tired... so tired... curling up in a warm and cosy bed seems like the perfect thing to do right now. Sweet dreams!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Modest Guest
spoilerText: Obtainable by sleeping on a Straw Mat 100 times. You don't need much to sleep comfortably. A pile of straw and a roof over your head - with the latter being completely optional - is quite enough to relax. You don't even mind the rats nibbling on your toes.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Monsterhunter
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing 200 Adept Weekly Kill Tasks. Fear me, monsters! There is some more slaying to come!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Moth Whisperer
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Hibernal Moth. Your lantern was too bewitching for a hibernal moth. It couldn't withstand and follows you, the bearer of the lantern, now.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

spoilerText: Obtained by completely discovering Southern Darama as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You have combed the desert and searched the pyramid city of Ankrahmun.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

relatedQuestNames: Adventures of Galthen Quest - Mitmah Vanguard
spoilerText: Obtained by defeating Mitmah Vanguard for the first time. You unveiled the secret plot of the Mitmah who stole away an entire civilisation for their own entertainment. Let the death of their outpost vanguard be an eternal lesson to them.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from quest reward: Adventures of Galthen Quest.

name: Mutagenius
spoilerText: Obtained by completing the mutagen task of The Cradle of Monsters Quest while having all 16 mutagens in the same colour. You accomplished the impossible and created 16 mutagens of corresponding colours
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from linked quest: The Cradle of Monsters Quest, The Cradle of Monsters Quest.

name: Mutated Presents
spoilerText: Obtainable by skinning The Mutated Pumpkin's dead body. Muahahaha it's a... mutated pumpkin! After helping to take it down - you DID help, didn't you? - you claimed your reward and got a more or less weird present. Happy Halloween!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Mystic Fabric Magic
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of the Elementalist Outfits. You vanquished the mad mage, you subdued the raging mage - no spellweaving self-exposer can stand in your way. Yet you are quite absorbed in magical studies yourself. This very fabric reflects this personal approval of the magic arts.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 70 from quest reward: Elementalist Outfits Quest.

name: Mystic Predator
spoilerText: Obtained by taming a Mystic Jaguar. Proving your true worth to a mystic creature like the jaguar, king of the hunt, granted you not only respect but also its heart.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 250 from related reward: Adventures of Galthen Quest.

name: Nanny from Hell
spoilerText: Obtainable by successfully taking care of a Demon Infant during the Demon's Lullaby event for 5 years. You have cheered up a bunch of demon babies and returned them to their mother. Don't bother the burn marks, don't bother the strains of grey hair, don't bother the nights you wake up screaming. It was worth it ... probably ... somehow.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Natural Born Cowboy
spoilerText: Obtainable after gaining first mount. Oh, the joy of riding! You've just got your very first own mount. Conveniently enough you don't even need stables, but can summon it any time you like.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Natural Sweetener
spoilerText: Obtainable by cutting 50 Sugar Canes. Liberty Bay is the perfect hangout for you and harvesting sugar cane quite a relaxing leisure activity. Would you like some tea with your sugar, hon?
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Navigational Error
spoilerText: Obtainable by speaking with Navigator (during the Liquid Black Quest). You confronted the Navigator.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 130 from quest reward: Liquid Black Quest.

name: Nestling
spoilerText: For killing Mamma Longlegs 3 times. You cleansed the land from an eight legged nuisance by defeating Mamma Longlegs three times. She won't be back soon... or will she?
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Nether Pirate
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing 10 journeys in A Pirate's Death to Me. Not fearing death or ghosts you have traveled with the ghost captain several times and are a seasoned traveler of the netherworld. The dead and the living whisper about your exploits with appreciation.

availability.label: Active when A Pirate's Death to Me is active: Friday on the 18th-23rd, usually through Monday.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Never Surrender
spoilerText: Obtained by killing 100 Sights of Surrender. Note: you don't need to be the person dealing the most damage to one. Anyone participating in the fight will receive one point when it gets killed. You did not show any signs of surrender to any sight of... you get the picture. Even a hundred of them did not pose a threat to you.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from related reward: Roshamuul Quest.

name: Nevermending Story
spoilerText: Obtainable by fishing all 11 Messages in a Bottle out of the water during the Roshamuul Quest and then finding the first mate. You collected all of the mysterious bottle messages around the island of Roshamuul and located the remains of the first mate. Time will tell if his tale of mending an evil ring holds true.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 200 from linked quest: Roshamuul Quest, Roshamuul Quest.

name: Nightmare Knight
spoilerText: Obtainable by joining to the Nightmare Knights in the Dreamer's Challenge Quest. You follow the path of dreams and that of responsibility without self-centered power. Free from greed and selfishness, you help others without expecting a reward.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from quest reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest.

name: Nightmare Walker
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Nightmare Outfits You do not fear nightmares, you travel in them - facing countless horrors and fighting the fate they're about to bring. Few believe the dark prophecies you bring back from those dreams, but those who do fight alongside you as Nightmare Knights.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 40 from quest reward: Dreamer's Challenge Quest, Nightmare Outfits Quest.

name: No Horse Open Sleigh
spoilerText: Obtainable by receiving a Bright Percht Sleigh, a Cold Percht Sleigh or a Dark Percht Sleigh. Note: You can obtain the 3 different Sleighs, but there is only one achievement given for the first one you chose. This sleigh is not driven by magic but pushed by a percht. Hopefully you two get along well together...!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: No More Hiding
related: Killing in the Name of... Quest
relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by slaying Hide. You've found a well-hidden spider queen and caught her off guard in the middle of her meal.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Noblesse Obliterated
spoilerText: Obtainable by killing Prince Drazzak in the Roshamuul Prison. After a battle like this you know who your friends are.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Nomad Soul
spoilerText: Obtainable by becoming a citizen of Ab'Dendriel, Ankrahmun, Carlin, Darashia, Edron, Farmine, Kazordoon, Liberty Bay, Port Hope, Svargrond, Thais, Venore, and Yalahar. Home is where your current favourite hunting ground is, and though you might hold certain places more dear than others you never feel attached enough to really stay in one city for long. Pack all your stuff - it's time to move on again.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Nothing but Hot Air
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting the Haze mount. You have tamed the ghostly mists to do your bidding. For now ...
inferenceReason: Recommended level 300 from linked quest: Feaster of Souls Quest.

You laugh at unprepared adventurers stuck in high grass or rush wood. Or maybe you actually do help them out. They call you... 'Machete'.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Notorious Worldsaver
spoilerText: Participate in the A Piece of Cake, Annual Autumn Vintage, Bewitched, Demon's Lullaby, Rise of Devovorga, The Colours of Magic, and The Lightbearer World Quests. You're in the front line when it comes to saving your world or taking part in social events. Whether you do it noticed or unnoticed by the people, your world can rely on you to dutifully do your part to make it a better place for everyone.

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Number of the Beast
spoilerText: Obtainable by rolling a 6 three times in a row with a die. Six. Six. Six.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Of Wolves and Bears
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Druid Outfits. One with nature, one with wildlife. Raw and animalistic power, sharpened senses, howling on the highest cliffs and roaring in the thickest forests - that's you.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Druid Outfits Quest.

name: Ogre Chef
spoilerText: Complete the The Chieftain's Menu mission of the Krailos Quest 3 times. You didn't manage to become an ogre chief. But at least you are, beyond doubt, a worthy ogre chef.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Krailos Quest.

name: One Foot Vs. Many
spoilerText: Obtainable by completing the Monster Extermination mission of the Bigfoot's Burden Quest. One Bigfoot won over thousands of tiny feet. Perhaps the gnomes are wrong and size matters?
inferenceReason: Recommended level 120 from linked quest: Bigfoot's Burden Quest, Bigfoot's Burden Quest.

name: One Less

relatedQuestNames: Killing in the Name of... Quest
spoilerText: Obtainable by slaying The Many. The Many is no more, but how many more are there? One can never know.
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: One Thousand and One

inferenceReason: Recommended level 70 from quest reward: Oriental Outfits Quest.

name: Oops
spoilerText: Obtainable by using birdcage until the bird dies from a heart attack. So much for your feathered little friend! Maybe standing in front of the birdcage, squeezing its neck and shouting 'Sing! Sing! Sing!' was a little too much for it?!
inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Orcsoberfest Welcome
spoilerText: Obtainable by winning on every game in the Orcsoberfest, and also defeating The Great Schnitzel and King Chuck. The Orcsoberfest is not only known for its traditional food, beer and customs but also fun events and excitement! You took part in all of that and can now truly say: "I survived!"

availability.label: Availability may depend on an event or world state.

name: Out in the Snowstorm
spoilerText: Obtainable by getting both addons of Norseman Outfits. Snow heaps and hailstorms can't keep you from where you want to go. You're perfectly equipped for any expedition into the perpetual ice and know how to keep your feet warm. If you're a woman, that's quite an accomplishment, too.
inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Norseman Outfits Quest.

name: Out of the Stone Age
spoilerText: Obtained by taming an Undead Cavebear. What a blast from the past! This thankful patient thinks you missed your dentist vocation. It's now ready to take a bite of the future and to carry you to your next adventure, or your next patient.

name: Over the Moon

inferenceReason: Recommended level 100 from quest reward: Grimvale Quest.

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Passionate Kisser
spoilerText: Obtainable by finishing the Kissing a Pig Quest. For you, a kiss is more than a simple touch of lips. inferenceReason: Recommended level 70 from quest reward: Kissing a Pig Quest.

name: Peazzekeeper

name: Pecking Order

name: Pest Control

inferenceReason: No reliable level estimate yet.

name: Petrologist
